label: New
items: AI Area Coach now analyses each plant in an area individually — showing how the current moisture, temperature and EC suit each one — and adds a compatibility check that tells you whether your plants suit sharing a spot (and when the only mismatch is how much they drink, it suggests zoned, plant-focused watering instead of moving them).

items.text: Automations now have a default run window: rules without their own time condition only act between 08:00 and 20:00 by default, so you won't get surprise overnight watering. Adjust the hours or switch it off any time.

label: Improved
items: Sensor automations now keep acting while their condition stays true — a "water when dry" rule re-waters each cooldown until the soil recovers, still capped by your run limit (previously it fired only once).
The task and sensor pickers in the automation builder are now searchable, so long lists are quick to navigate instead of clogging up the screen.

label: Fixed
items: The AI Area Coach now reliably fills in the soil moisture, EC and temperature target ranges for the plants in your areas, so its coaching is grounded in real numbers.
